title: Consumption
summary: Account-level overview of usage and billing consumption. Shows total query counts across all Knowledge Boxes and token usage over time.
capabilities: View account-wide consumption and billing usage statistics
Compare total queries across the last 30 days, last 12 months, and since account creation
Review the total number of Knowledge Boxes in the account
Switch between Consumption, Subscriptions, Users, and Preferences tabs (simple mode)

title: Manage account
summary: Edit account details and configure company-wide settings including SAML single sign-on (SSO) and account deletion.
capabilities: Edit account name, slug, and description
Configure SAML SSO: domains, entity ID, SSO URL, certificate, and auth context
Delete the account
Review the account UID

title: Account's Knowledge Boxes
summary: Lists all Knowledge Boxes in the account with quota usage. Use this page to create, manage, or delete Knowledge Boxes and check how many are allowed in your plan.
capabilities: View all Knowledge Boxes and how many are used against the account limit
Create a new Knowledge Box
Open user management for a specific Knowledge Box
Edit Knowledge Box preferences
Delete a Knowledge Box

title: Retrieval agents
summary: Lists all Retrieval Agents in the account. Use this page to create, configure, or delete agents, and to browse their saved conversation sessions.
capabilities: Create a new Retrieval Agent
Open an agent's configuration for editing
Browse the sessions list for an agent to see past conversations
Delete an agent

title: Manage users
summary: Manage team members and their roles at the account level. Invite new users by email, change roles, and remove users or pending invitations.
capabilities: Invite a team member by email and assign a role
View total user count and remaining license seats
Change a user's role
Remove a user or cancel a pending invitation

title: Models
summary: Configure custom AI model integrations at the account level, including OpenAI-compatible models and Bedrock integrations. Manage model restrictions across the account.
capabilities: Create a custom AI model configuration
Set up an AWS Bedrock integration
Apply model restrictions across the account
Delete a model configuration or integration

title: Agentic RAG Understanding API keys
summary: Manage API keys for programmatic access to the Agentic RAG Understanding API. Create, rotate, review activity, and delete NUA keys.
capabilities: Create a new NUA API key
Generate (rotate) an existing key
View activity log for a key
Delete a key

title: Subscription tiers
summary: Compare all subscription plans, their pricing, limits, and included features. Use this page to check what your current plan includes or to upgrade to a higher tier.
capabilities: Compare subscription tiers and monthly pricing
Review plan limits: file size, number of Knowledge Boxes, support level, audit log
See which plan is currently active
Upgrade to a higher plan
Contact sales for enterprise plans

title: My subscription
summary: View your active subscription details: current plan, quota usage, over-limit costs, and next payment date. Manage renewal or cancellation from here.
capabilities: View current subscription plan and status
Review quotas and over-limit pricing
Check the next payment date and amount
Cancel (end) subscription renewal
Reactivate a subscription that is ending

title: Knowledge Box: {{name}}
summary: Overview dashboard for a Knowledge Box. Shows the KB endpoint, UID, recent resources, storage totals, usage charts, and RAG health metrics (REMi). Quick access to settings and testing.
capabilities: Copy the KB endpoint URL, MCP server command, and UID
Open the Knowledge Box test page
Browse recent resources and switch between processed and pending
Review storage totals and usage charts (queries, asks, tokens)
View REMi RAG health signals
Navigate to settings

title: Upload data
summary: Add content to a Knowledge Box by uploading files, folders, links, text, CSV, sitemaps, or Q&A pairs. Entry point for all manual content ingestion.
capabilities: Upload files or entire folders
Add web links or URLs
Add raw text content
Import CSV data or Q&A pairs
Add a sitemap for bulk web content
Navigate to the Synchronize page for automated cloud sync

title: Resources
summary: Browse and manage all content (resources) stored in a Knowledge Box. Search, filter by type or label, check processing status, and upload more content.
capabilities: Search all resources in the Knowledge Box
Filter resources by type, labels, date, and visibility
Switch between processed, processing, and error views to check status
Upload more content directly from this page
Open and edit individual resources

title: Search
summary: Test and configure the search experience for a Knowledge Box. Live search preview with a configuration panel for tuning search and RAG settings. Create a widget from the current configuration.
capabilities: Test and preview the search and ask experience
Tune search configuration: filters, boosting, RAG settings
Open or resize the configuration panel
Create a widget from the current search configuration

title: NER
summary: Browse named entities (people, places, organizations, and custom types) automatically extracted from the Knowledge Box content. Inspect entities within each family.
capabilities: Browse named entity families (people, places, organizations, custom types)
Select a family to see all extracted entities
Search for a specific entity within a family

title: Label sets
summary: Create and manage label sets for categorizing and tagging resources in a Knowledge Box. Labels can be applied to full resources or individual text blocks.
capabilities: Create a new label set
Browse resource-level and text-block-level label sets
Check for labels that are defined but not yet applied (missing labels)

title: AI models (Knowledge Box)
summary: Configure which AI models are used for a Knowledge Box: answer generation, summarization, semantic search, extraction, and anonymization. Supports custom OpenAI-compatible models.
capabilities: Change the AI model used for answer generation
Configure summarization and semantic search models
Configure extraction and anonymization models
Switch to a custom OpenAI-compatible model or your own API key

title: Widgets
summary: Create and manage embeddable search widgets for a Knowledge Box. Generate an HTML snippet to embed the search experience in any website or application.
capabilities: Create a new search widget
Customize widget appearance and behavior
Generate the HTML embed snippet to add to a webpage
Preview the widget
Rename, duplicate, or delete a widget

title: Settings
summary: Edit the configuration of a Knowledge Box: name, slug, description, security settings, allowed origins, and publication state.
capabilities: Rename the Knowledge Box or change its slug
Edit the description
Configure security: hidden resources, allowed origins, IP restrictions
Publish or retire the Knowledge Box
Delete the Knowledge Box configuration

title: Structured field schemas
summary: Define reusable structured field schemas (custom metadata) for resources in a Knowledge Box. Schemas describe the shape of custom fields that can be attached to resources.
capabilities: Create a new structured field schema
Review schema fields and which are required
Edit an existing schema
Delete a schema

title: Users
summary: Manage who has access to a Knowledge Box. Invite users by email, assign roles (owner, contributor, reader), change roles, and remove users or pending invitations.
capabilities: Invite a user by email and assign a role (owner, contributor, reader)
Add an admin or owner to the Knowledge Box
Change a user's role
Remove a user or cancel a pending invitation
View all current users and their roles

title: API keys
summary: Create and manage API keys for programmatic access to a Knowledge Box. Use these keys for server-side integrations and SDK access.
capabilities: Create a service access entry and generate an API key
Review existing keys and their expiry dates
Rotate (generate a new) API key
Delete a service access or individual key

title: Usage Analysis
summary: Analyze query usage and answer quality metrics for a Knowledge Box. Shows REMi score averages (answer quality, context relevance, groundedness) and per-query details.
capabilities: Review average answer quality, context relevance, and groundedness scores
Filter by date range and status
Download usage logs for a selected period
Drill into individual query details in the side panel

title: Search Activity
summary: View the history of search queries sent to a Knowledge Box and the AI-generated answers returned for each. Useful for auditing past interactions, reviewing specific answers, and exporting query logs.
capabilities: Review the history of search queries and AI-generated answers
Open a row to read the full question and answer for any past interaction
Filter by date range and apply conditions
Search for a specific query in the log
Download query and answer history as CSV or NDJSON
Toggle visible columns

title: Resource Activity
summary: Track the ingestion and processing history of resources uploaded to a Knowledge Box. See which resources were processed successfully, are pending, or encountered errors.
capabilities: View processing history for uploaded resources
Filter by synthetic status (processed, pending, error) and field conditions
Search for a specific resource in the activity log
Review processed resource and paragraph totals
Download activity data as CSV or NDJSON

title: Tokens & Time Usage
summary: Track token consumption and processing time for a Knowledge Box. See billed token totals and per-request breakdowns to understand and optimize AI costs.
capabilities: Review total billed tokens for the selected period
See per-request token and time breakdowns
Filter by date range and conditions
Download token usage logs as CSV or NDJSON

title: RAG Evaluation Metrics (REMi)
summary: Evaluate the quality of AI-generated answers for a Knowledge Box using REMi metrics. Identifies answers with missing knowledge or bad user feedback, and tracks quality trends over time.
capabilities: Review overall answer quality health status and evolution charts
Identify queries where the knowledge base lacks sufficient information (missing knowledge)
Review queries that received negative user feedback
Drill into individual results and suggested improvement actions
Change the evaluation period

title: User Feedback
summary: Review feedback that users submitted on AI-generated answers (thumbs up/down ratings and comments). Use this page to assess how well answers are meeting user expectations.
capabilities: Browse user feedback events (ratings and comments on answers)
Filter by date range and feedback type
Search feedback entries
Open a row to see the full question, answer, and user comment
Download feedback data as CSV or NDJSON

title: RAG lab
summary: Experiment with prompt configurations and RAG strategies for a Knowledge Box before applying them to production. Test different LLMs, prompts, and search settings side by side.
capabilities: Test custom prompts with all supported LLMs
Compare different RAG strategies and search configurations
Switch between Prompt lab and RAG lab tabs
Apply a tested configuration to the Knowledge Box

title: Data Augmentation Agents
summary: Create and manage automated agents that enrich or process resources in a Knowledge Box. Supports labeling, Q&A generation, graph extraction, and content safety tasks.
capabilities: Create a data augmentation agent (labeler, ask, graph, synthetic Q&A, LlamaGuard, prompt-guard)
Run an agent to automatically process and enrich resources
Edit, duplicate, or delete an existing agent
Sort agents by creation date

title: Synchronize
summary: Set up automated cloud storage synchronization into a Knowledge Box. Supports Google Drive, Microsoft SharePoint, OneDrive, Dropbox, AWS S3, and ShareFile. Keeps the KB up to date as files change.
capabilities: Add a cloud storage connector (Google Drive, SharePoint, OneDrive, Dropbox, S3, ShareFile)
Choose sync mode: cloud, desktop, or server
Review sync jobs and their last sync status
Enable or disable a sync job
Edit, view folders, or delete a sync job

title: Agent workflows
summary: View and manage the AI workflows (pipelines) that define how a Retrieval Agent processes and answers queries. Each workflow is a configurable sequence of steps.
capabilities: View all workflows for this agent
Create a new workflow
Open and edit a workflow's pipeline configuration
Edit workflow tool parameters
Copy the MCP endpoint for the agent
Delete a non-default workflow

title: Sessions list
summary: Browse the history of past conversation sessions with a Retrieval Agent. Each session contains the full record of questions asked and AI-generated answers returned. Use this page to review past interactions and answer history.
capabilities: Review history of past conversations and AI-generated answers
Search for a specific session
Filter sessions by date range
Open a session to read the full question-and-answer history
Delete a session

title: Sources
summary: Manage the knowledge sources (data connections) available to a Retrieval Agent. Sources define where the agent retrieves information when answering questions.
capabilities: Add a new knowledge source by selecting a driver type
Review existing sources and their provider
Edit a source configuration
Delete a source

title: Search
summary: Test and configure the search and ask experience for a Retrieval Agent. Live preview with a configuration panel for tuning search and RAG settings. Create a widget from the current configuration.
capabilities: Test and preview the search and ask experience
Tune search configuration: filters, boosting, RAG settings
Open or resize the configuration panel
Create a widget from the current search configuration

title: Widgets
summary: Create and manage embeddable chat or search widgets for a Retrieval Agent. Generate an HTML snippet to embed the agent's conversational experience in any website or application.
capabilities: Create a new agent widget
Customize widget appearance and behavior
Generate the HTML embed snippet to add to a webpage
Preview the widget
Rename, duplicate, or delete a widget

title: Settings
summary: Edit the configuration of a Retrieval Agent: name, slug, description, security settings, allowed origins, and publication state.
capabilities: Rename the agent or change its slug
Edit the description
Configure security: hidden resources, allowed origins, IP restrictions
Publish or retire the agent

title: Users
summary: Manage who has access to a Retrieval Agent. Invite users by email, assign roles (owner, contributor, reader), change roles, and remove users or pending invitations.
capabilities: Invite a user by email and assign a role (owner, contributor, reader)
Add an admin or owner to the agent
Change a user's role
Remove a user or cancel a pending invitation

title: API keys
summary: Create and manage API keys for programmatic access to a Retrieval Agent. Use these keys for server-side integrations.
capabilities: Create a service access entry and generate an API key
Review existing keys and their expiry dates
Rotate (generate a new) API key
Delete a service access or individual key

title: Activity log
summary: Download and inspect monthly activity logs for a Retrieval Agent. Logs contain a record of all agent interactions, including queries sent and answers generated.
capabilities: Request an activity log download for a specific month
Review the log table of agent interactions and answers
Refresh an existing log download
Expand a month to inspect its full interaction log

title: AI models
summary: Configure which AI models are used for a Retrieval Agent: answer generation, summarization, semantic search, extraction, and anonymization. Supports custom OpenAI-compatible models.
capabilities: Change the AI model used for answer generation
Configure summarization and semantic search models
Configure extraction and anonymization models
Switch to a custom OpenAI-compatible model or your own API key

title: Profile & preferences
summary: Update your personal profile and dashboard preferences. Change the interface language, display name, and email address.
capabilities: Change the dashboard display language (English, Spanish, French, Catalan)
Update your display name
Change or verify your email address
